scene_description:
**Foreground to Background Description:**  

- **Left foreground:** Dense green foliage (bushes with broad leaves, some with purple stems) grows along the edge of the road. A tall wooden utility pole (dark brown, vertical, with visible cracks) stands near the road’s edge. The pole has multiple overhead power lines (black) extending rightward, a blue wire wrapped around its lower section, and a curved metal arm supporting a rectangular street lamp (light brown, unlit).  
- **Center foreground:** A narrow concrete road (light gray, cracked, uneven texture) stretches straight into the distance. The road has no visible lane markings or crosswalks.  
- **Right foreground:** A weathered concrete wall (gray, rough texture, discolored patches) runs parallel to the road. A low wooden railing (light brown, weathered, with vertical posts) tops the wall. Dense green vegetation (bushes, tall plants with large leaves) grows behind the wall, partially obscuring a structure with a corrugated metal roof (gray).  

- **Left mid-ground:** An agricultural field (light brown, dry soil with sparse young plants) extends to the left of the road. A single-story building (white walls, red-tiled gable roof) sits within the field. The building has rectangular windows (dark frames) and a covered porch area; smaller dark-roofed structures are visible nearby.  
- **Center mid-ground:** The road continues straight, flanked by dense greenery (bushes, small trees). A distant utility pole (dark, similar to the foreground pole) with overhead power lines is visible along the road.  
- **Right mid-ground:** Behind the concrete wall, dense vegetation (tall green plants, some flowering) and a structure with a corrugated metal roof (gray) are partially visible.  

- **Background:** The road vanishes into a distant point, bordered by more trees (dark green, dense foliage) and scattered utility poles. The sky is clear blue (no clouds) above the entire scene.  

**Additional Categories:**  
- **Text & Signs:** No visible text, signs, or banners (no road name signs, shop signs, or markings).  
- **Infrastructure:**  
  - *Utility poles:* Multiple wooden poles (left foreground, center background) with 4–5 overhead power lines each; no transformers or insulators visible.  
  - *Bollards/barriers:* None.  
  - *Street lamps:* One lamp (left side) with a curved metal arm and rectangular head.  
  - *Traffic lights:* None.  
  - *Fire hydrants:* None.  
  - *Guardrails/fences:* Concrete wall with wooden railing (right side).  
- **Vehicles & Plates:** No vehicles visible on the road.  
- **Road Surface & Markings:** Concrete road, no lane lines or crosswalks; no curbs (road bordered by vegetation on the left and a wall on the right).  
- **Buildings & Architecture:** Left side: building with red gable roof and white walls. Right side: structure with corrugated metal roof.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain:** Dense green bushes (left and right), agricultural field (left), and flat terrain (no elevation changes).

details.name: wooden utility pole
details.reason: The blue wire wrapped around the lower section is a highly specific, localized detail.
details.focused_description: A tall, vertical wooden utility pole with a rectangular cross-section. The wood is weathered, exhibiting a dark brown to grayish color with signs of aging and exposure. The surface has a rough texture and small holes (likely from hardware) along its length. The material is wood, and the condition shows weathering. No visible text is present on the pole.

details.name: red-tiled roof
details.reason: Red-tiled gable roofs are common in certain regions such as parts of Europe, Latin America, or Southeast Asia.
details.focused_description: The red-tiled roof is a sloped structure featuring a series of parallel white stripes running horizontally across its surface. The tiles display a reddish-brown (red) color, with the white stripes evenly spaced. The material appears to be a smooth, possibly metal-based roofing material. The roof has a rectangular shape and is in good condition, showing no visible damage.

details.name: street lamp
details.reason: The rectangular head and curved metal arm are specific utility infrastructure features.
details.focused_description: The street lamp is a horizontal, elongated rectangular fixture attached to a dark brown metal arm extending from a utility pole. The lamp housing is made of metal with a light brown/beige color, showing signs of wear, discoloration, and possible rust. The fixture has a long, narrow shape with a slightly curved top edge and no visible text or markings. The metal arm connecting to the pole is dark brown and appears weathered.

details.name: concrete wall
details.reason: The presence of a concrete wall topped with a wooden railing is a specific roadside boundary style.
details.focused_description: The concrete wall is a low, rectangular structure running parallel to the road. It is made of concrete with a weathered, light gray base color, showing dark brown discoloration and stains along its surface. The wall has a rough texture and visible vertical seams where sections meet. It appears aged with signs of moisture damage and wear. No text or distinct markings are visible on the wall.
